rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 1, 2022 line 1. PETITIONER AMJAD ASAD'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice. Service by mail requires additional 5 days and the POS for personal service indicates that only 11-day Court notice was provided. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PACIFIC EQUITIES, LLC VS. RUSSELL DANIEL COLE DBA DELTA T MECHANICAL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 1, 2022 line 2. DEFENDANT RUSSELL DANIEL COLE DBA DELTA T MECHANICAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege breach and facts supporting the conclusion that breach occurred on March 1, 2016 in light of the exhibits and the payment date in May 2016. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC VS. KAYLA HOLLINGSWORTH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 1, 2022 line 4. DEFENDANT LISA ANGELONE'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on February 1, 2022 claimant to provide to the Court and to the Plaintiff copies of (1) the written rental agreement referenced in the application; and (2) copies of cancelled checks evidencing rental payment prior to August 4, 2021 to present; or (3) copies of bank statements evidencing cash withdrawals in the amount of monthly rent; or (4) any other documents evidencing payment of rent before August 4, 2021 to present. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
